---
title: "APP"
author: "Kellie Linehan"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
game <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Game_Cleaned (1).csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
practice <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Practice_Cleaned (1).csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

library(shiny)
library(tidyverse)


game <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Game_Cleaned (1).csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
practice <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Practice_Cleaned (1).csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

shots <- bind_rows(
  game %>% mutate(Source = "Game"),
  practice %>% mutate(Source = "Practice")
)

shots_model <- shots %>%
  mutate(
    made       = as.integer(MadeShot),
    shot_zone  = factor(ShotZone),
    contest    = factor(Shot.Contest),
    shot_type  = factor(Shot.Type),
    shot_clock = case_when(
      Shot.Clock == "5-0"   ~ 1,
      Shot.Clock == "10-6"  ~ 2,
      Shot.Clock == "21-11" ~ 3,
      Shot.Clock == "22+"   ~ 4,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    shot_value = as.numeric(ShotValue)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(made), !is.na(shot_clock), !is.na(shot_value))

set.seed(123)
n <- nrow(shots_model)
train_idx  <- sample(seq_len(n), size = 0.8 * n)
train_data <- shots_model[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- shots_model[-train_idx, ]

train_data <- train_data %>%
  mutate(
    shot_zone = droplevels(shot_zone),
    contest   = droplevels(contest),
    shot_type = droplevels(shot_type)
  )

use_zone    <- nlevels(train_data$shot_zone)  > 1
use_contest <- nlevels(train_data$contest)    > 1
use_type    <- nlevels(train_data$shot_type)  > 1

formula_str <- "made ~ shot_zone"
if (use_zone)    formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ shot_clock")
if (use_contest) formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ contest")
if (use_type)    formula_str <- paste(formula_str, "+ shot_type")

shot_glm <- glm(
  as.formula(formula_str),
  data   = train_data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

test_data <- test_data %>%
  mutate(
    p_make        = predict(shot_glm, newdata = test_data, type = "response"),
    exp_points    = p_make * shot_value,
    actual_points = made * shot_value,
    points_above_exp = actual_points - exp_points
  )

player_zone_summary <- test_data %>%
  group_by(Shooter, ShotZone) %>%
  summarise(
    attempts          = n(),
    actual_pts        = sum(actual_points),
    expected_pts      = sum(exp_points),
    pts_above_exp     = actual_pts - expected_pts,
    pts_above_exp_100 = 100 * pts_above_exp / attempts,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Shiny app 

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("AU Shooting Dashboard - Shot Zones"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "player",
        "Select player:",
        choices = sort(unique(player_zone_summary$Shooter)),
        selected = sort(unique(player_zone_summary$Shooter))[1]
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      h3(textOutput("player_title")),
      tableOutput("zone_table"),
      plotOutput("zone_barplot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  player_data <- reactive({
    player_zone_summary %>%
      filter(Shooter == input$player) %>%
      arrange(desc(pts_above_exp_100))
  })

  output$player_title <- renderText({
    paste("Shot zone performance for", input$player)
  })

output$zone_table <- renderTable({
  player_data() %>%
    select(
      ShotZone,
      attempts,
      actual_pts,
      expected_pts,
      pts_above_exp
    )
})

output$zone_barplot <- renderPlot({
  df <- player_data()
  ggplot(df, aes(x = ShotZone, y = pts_above_exp, fill = ShotZone)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      x = "Shot Zone",
      y = "Points above expected",
      title = "Performance by shot zone"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
})

}

shinyApp(ui, server)



```
